raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "The Cal Grant program provides financial aid to students based on merit and need.",
    "Since its inception in 2001, the amount granted to students attending private nonprofits has dropped by 4%.",
    "The awards for University of California (UC) students have risen by 274% since the inception of the Cal Grant program.",
    "The awards for California State University (CSU) students have risen by 224% since the inception of the Cal Grant program.",
    "39% of low-income students who attend private nonprofit colleges rise to the top 20% of income earners.",
